name: Parsley and Mint Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Bunches flat leaf parsley, leaves only, washed and dried
1 bunch fresh mint, leaves only, washed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a small pan of lightly salted water to a boil. Blanch the sliced garlic for about 3 minutes, then drain.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, orange juice, sea salt, and freshly ground black pepper. Slowly drizzle in the olive oil while continuously whisking until emulsified. Stir in the minced chipotle peppers.
3. Place washed and dried greens in a bowl, add the slivered garlic, and pour over the dressing to coat evenly. Divide a mound of greens onto each plate and top with 2 warm crab cakes. Serve immediately.
Yield: 6 servings
